💡 Pay via Airtel Money or MTN Mobile Money to 0977 638790 or 0960271128, the amount for your chosen plan, then enter your transaction ID here.
🎁 Optional: Reward loyal MotoConnect riders directly. You decide the offer and how it's earned — MotoConnect only confirms the rider has an active subscription and counts visits fairly. You're never charged anything extra for this; the reward itself is provided by you, on your own terms.
Shown to riders exactly as you type it. You decide what's fair for your business.
💡 If riders usually spend a little each visit (e.g. a few liters at a time), "visits" works better than a once-a-week discount — small amounts add up faster across several visits than they ever could in one.
Staff log each visit on the Verify page; the reward triggers automatically on the Nth visit and the count resets.
Staff enter the amount spent at each visit; once the running total crosses this, the reward triggers and the total resets.
Just an anti-abuse spacing rule — it doesn't control when the reward fires, only how often a visit can be logged.

📋 Review Your Listing

⚠️ Your listing will be reviewed by admin and will go live once approved. You will be contacted on your phone.

📄 Terms of Service

Effective Date: 1 January 2025
These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the MotoConnect Zambia platform ("Platform"), operated by NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED (trading as Spike Trading and General Dealers), a company registered in Zambia ("we", "us", "our").

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing the Platform, submitting a rider application, or using any feature of MotoConnect Zambia, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

2. The Platform

MotoConnect Zambia is a transport subscription management platform that connects riders (motorbike operators, taxi operators, tour operators) with customers across Zambia. The Platform facilitates subscription management, public rider directories, and booking enquiries. We do not provide transport services directly.

3. Rider Registration & Subscriptions

  • You must provide accurate and complete information when submitting a rider application.
  • Applications are subject to admin review and approval. We reserve the right to reject any application without stating a reason.
  • Subscriptions are offered on Basic (K50/month), Standard (K100/month), and Premium (K200/month) plans. Fees are payable in advance via Airtel Money or MTN Mobile Money.
  • Subscriptions are non-refundable once activated.
  • Your listing may be removed if you fail to renew your subscription or if you violate these Terms.

4. Advertiser Registration & Subscriptions

  • MotoConnect Zambia offers paid advertising placements ("Nearby Deals") through which third-party businesses ("Advertisers") may list offers, promotions, and business information to Platform users.
  • Advertisers must provide accurate business information, including a valid business name, category, contact number, and operating zone. Advertisers are solely responsible for the accuracy of all submitted content, including offers, pricing, and any logo or image uploaded.
  • By uploading a logo or business image, the Advertiser warrants that they own the rights to that image or have authorisation to use it, and grants NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED a non-exclusive licence to display it on the Platform for the duration of their active subscription.
  • Advertiser listings are subject to admin review and approval. We reserve the right to reject or remove any advertiser listing without stating a reason, including for content we consider misleading, inappropriate, or in breach of these Terms.
  • Advertiser subscriptions are offered on Basic (K300/month), Featured (K600/month), and Premium (K1000/month) plans. Fees are payable in advance via Airtel Money or MTN Mobile Money. Subscriptions are non-refundable once activated.
  • We do not verify the accuracy of advertiser offers, the quality of advertised goods or services, or an advertiser's ability to honour any promotion displayed. Users engage with advertised businesses entirely at their own discretion and risk.
  • MotoConnect Zambia does not endorse any advertiser or their products/services merely by displaying their listing.
  • An advertiser's listing may be removed at any time if they fail to renew their subscription, provide false information, or violate these Terms.

5. Acceptable Use

You must not:

  • Provide false personal or vehicle information.
  • Use the Platform to engage in illegal, fraudulent, or harmful activities.
  • Harass, threaten, or deceive customers or other riders.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any restricted or non-public part of the Platform.
  • Scrape, copy, or redistribute Platform data without our written permission.

6. Platform Availability

We aim to keep MotoConnect Zambia available at all times but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We may suspend or modify the Platform for maintenance, updates, or any other reason without notice. We are not liable for any loss resulting from unavailability of the Platform.

7. Intellectual Property

All content, design, and software on the Platform is owned by NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED or its licensors. You may not reproduce, modify, or distribute any part of the Platform without our prior written consent.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by Zambian law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from your use of the Platform, including loss of income, disputes with customers, or transport incidents. Our total liability to you shall not exceed the subscription fees paid by you in the three months preceding the claim.

9. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED, its owners, directors, officers, employees, developers, contractors, and agents (collectively, the "Indemnified Parties") from and against any and all claims, demands, suits, losses, liabilities, damages, fines, penalties, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees and disbursements) of any kind, arising out of, relating to, or in connection with:

  • your access to or use of the Platform, whether or not authorised;
  • your breach or alleged breach of these Terms;
  • any inaccurate, false, or misleading information submitted by you;
  • any transport service you provide, including any accident, injury, death, property damage, theft, fare dispute, or other incident arising from or connected with your activities as a rider, taxi operator, or tour operator;
  • any content, offer, claim, image, or material submitted by you as an Advertiser, including any dispute arising from a promotion you advertised but did not honour;
  • any dispute, claim, or complaint brought by a customer, another rider, another advertiser, or any third party against you;
  • your violation of any applicable law, regulation, licensing requirement, or right of a third party; or
  • any content, data, or material you submit, post, or transmit through the Platform.

This indemnity applies regardless of whether the underlying claim is based in contract, tort, negligence, strict liability, or any other legal theory, and regardless of whether the Indemnified Parties were aware of or could have foreseen the circumstances giving rise to the claim. This indemnity shall survive the termination or expiry of your use of the Platform, your subscription, and these Terms, and applies to the fullest extent permitted under the laws of the Republic of Zambia. The Indemnified Parties reserve the right, at your expense, to assume the exclusive defence and control of any matter otherwise subject to indemnification by you, and you agree to cooperate fully with such defence.

10. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Zambia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Zambia.

11. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

12. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us via WhatsApp or phone at +260 977 638790 or +260 960 271128.

🔒 Privacy Policy

Effective Date: 1 January 2025
This Privacy Policy explains how NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED (trading as Spike Trading and General Dealers) collects, uses, and protects personal data through the MotoConnect Zambia platform ("Platform"). We are committed to compliance with the Zambia Data Protection Act, 2021.

1. Data We Collect

When you use the Platform, we may collect:

  • Personal identifiers: Full name, NRC number, phone number, home area/neighbourhood.
  • Vehicle information: Vehicle type, operating zones, operating hours, preferred subscription plan.
  • Payment references: Airtel Money or MTN Mobile Money transaction IDs (we do not store account PINs or full payment credentials).
  • Application notes: Any additional information you voluntarily provide in the notes field.
  • Usage data: Device type, browser, approximate location (if you permit), and interaction logs for platform improvement.

2. How We Use Your Data

  • To process and manage your rider application and subscription.
  • To display your profile (name, vehicle type, zone, availability) in the public rider directory.
  • To contact you via phone or WhatsApp regarding your subscription, renewal reminders, or application status.
  • To verify payment and issue renewal notices.
  • To improve and maintain the Platform.

3. Public Directory & Listings

If your application is approved and your subscription is active, the following information will be visible publicly on the MotoConnect Zambia rider directory: name, vehicle type, operating zone, availability status, operating hours, and contact phone number. By submitting an application, you consent to this public display. You may request removal at any time by contacting us. The same public-display consent applies to approved Advertiser listings described in Section 4 below.

4. Advertiser Data

If you register as an Advertiser, we collect: business name, category, contact number, operating zone, logo/image, promotional text, subscription tier, and payment transaction reference. This information is displayed publicly in the Nearby Deals section and, for Featured/Premium tiers, in the dashboard banner. We do not share individual user data (names, phone numbers, location) with Advertisers. Advertisers may see only aggregate, non-identifying statistics (e.g. approximate number of views in their zone) if such a feature is introduced in future.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:

  • Cloud service providers: We use secure third-party cloud infrastructure to store and sync rider and advertiser data across authorised devices, in accordance with industry-standard security practices.
  • Platform administrators: Staff authorised to manage the Platform.
  • Legal authorities: Where required by Zambian law or a lawful order.

6. Data Retention

We retain your personal data for as long as your subscription is active plus a period of 12 months thereafter, unless you request deletion earlier. Expired or rejected applications and advertiser listings may be retained for up to 6 months for administrative purposes.

7. Your Rights

Under the Zambia Data Protection Act, 2021, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you.
  • Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • Request deletion of your data (subject to legal obligations).
  • Withdraw consent at any time (this may result in removal from the directory or Nearby Deals listing).
  • Lodge a complaint with the Zambia Information and Communications Technology Authority (ZICTA).

8. Data Security

We implement reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data, including encrypted cloud storage and access controls on restricted parts of the Platform. No system is completely secure; please contact us immediately if you believe your data has been compromised.

9. Cookies & Local Storage

The Platform uses browser localStorage to store data locally on your device for offline functionality. We do not use third-party advertising networks or behavioural ad-tracking. MotoConnect Zambia displays paid listings from local businesses ("Advertisers") directly, based only on the zone you are browsing — we do not share your personal data, browsing history, or contact details with Advertisers.

10. Children's Privacy

The Platform is not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe a minor has submitted data, please contact us for immediate removal.

11. Contact & Complaints

For any privacy enquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us:
NEXLITE DIGITAL SOLUTIONS LIMITED (t/a Spike Trading and General Dealers)
Zambia
WhatsApp / Phone: +260 977 638790 or +260 960 271128
